# Irregular quad + triangular hole with a large `stalls_per_face`.
# Exercises cross-aisle insertion on a non-axis-aligned boundary with
# an unusual per-face stall budget.

polygon outer
-48.47,0
750,0
782.80,654.85
0,654.85
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

polygon hole
275,150
475,150
375,343.66
----
hole: 3 vertices

set stalls_per_face=179
----
set stalls_per_face=179

generate
----
total_stalls: 1453

snapshot
----
